dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Now is not the time to be so carefree, Bloody.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Fedop is the gladine today, mate.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I'm the one that should hurry up!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: You're going to be late if you don't hurry!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Was there someone that handsome at old school?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Someone so eye-catching should be very popular.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: To be late on a day that I am guarding the gate...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I can't let you off easy, especially since you're in my class.

summary: Blance and Elance notice a handsome individual. Someone is urged to hurry to avoid being late, while another character reflects on the handsome person's popularity. A teacher or authority figure warns a student about being late for class.
